dependency_path: LLM demand -> GPU cluster -> HBM/networking/rack systems
overseas_bottleneck: GPU supply, CUDA ecosystem, HBM attach, networking
counterevidence: ASIC substitution, customer capex slowdown, margin pressure

dependency_path: GPU/ASIC demand -> leading node + advanced packaging -> wafer/package revenue
up_downstream: GPU/ASIC customers, OSAT, substrate and equipment suppliers
counterevidence: geopolitical risk, customer concentration, capacity normalization

module: Data center power and thermal infrastructure
dependency_path: AI data center buildout -> rack power/cooling -> equipment backlog
overseas_bottleneck: power and cooling equipment lead times
counterevidence: orders pulled forward, data center delays, pricing pressure

dependency_path: AI cloud capex -> AI server/rack demand -> ODM delivery
overseas_bottleneck: AI server rack integration and delivery
counterevidence: low margin assembly, customer concentration, inventory risk
